color_profiles.name: Rose / Pure Pink Morganite
color_profiles.cause: Mn2+/Mn3+ at moderate concentration; ideal ratio for purest rose-pink.

color_profiles.name: Peach Morganite
color_profiles.cause: Higher Mn with Fe contributions or natural irradiation color centers.

visual_notes: Morganite's soft rose-peach color is inherently gentle and warm — less assertive than ruby, less cold than pink sapphire. Large clean crystals are available. The rose-gold + morganite combination became dominant in contemporary jewelry design in the 2010s.
